title: Parax v0.5: Parametric Modeling in JAX [P]
author: Reddit r/MachineLearning
summary: Parax v0.5 is a JAX-native library for parametric modeling, redesigned to support general-purpose JAX workflows with an opt-in, composable API. It introduces expressive abstractions for constrained/derived parameters, metadata-aware PyTrees, and flexible parameterization—enabling safer, more maintainable model definitions in scientific computing and ML. Its emphasis on extensibility and functional purity aligns with JAX’s philosophy while filling a gap in structured parameter management.
